content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Patched the two pending same-`run_id` failure-reconciliation gaps additively. In `src/contexts/automation_runtime/daemon_loop.rs`, daemon-side failure reconciliation no longer falls back to an older terminal lineage row when a newer retry reused the same `run_id`; instead it requires a non-terminal/exact lineage match or safely repairs the missing retry start row before reconciling, and it now has a regression proving the repaired retry is counted as attempt 2 instead of mutating the older failure in place. In `src/cli/run.rs`, terminal milestone sync now mirrors that repair path for failed same-`run_id` retries even when an older same-run terminal lineage row already exists, so CLI failure sync can reopen/repair the retry lineage and reconcile the failure instead of erroring out. I added focused regressions for both runtime paths and reran the Rust validation suite.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Updated `src/contexts/automation_runtime/daemon_loop.rs` so failure reconciliation only trusts non-terminal/exact same-run lineage for the current attempt, repairs a missing retry start row when durable metadata proves the newer attempt, and fails closed when that repair would be unsafe.
2. [Completed] Updated `src/cli/run.rs` so failed terminal milestone sync repairs missing same-run retry lineage before calling `reconcile_failure_sync()`, even when an older same-run terminal lineage row already exists.
3. [Completed] Added focused regressions covering daemon-side same-run retry repair and CLI-side failed retry sync repair for missing lineage.
4. [Completed] Ran formatting checks, the new focused tests, the full `cargo test` suite, the `cargo clippy --features test-stub -- -D warnings` gate, and launched the required `nix build` verification.

## Validation Evidence

- `cargo fmt --check` passed after formatting the patched files.
- `cargo test sync_terminal_milestone_task_repairs_missing_failed_retry_lineage_for_same_run_id -- --nocapture` passed.
- `cargo test --features test-stub try_reconcile_failure_repairs_missing_same_run_retry_lineage_before_recording_failure -- --nocapture` passed.
- `cargo test` passed on the full suite.
- `cargo clippy --features test-stub -- -D warnings` passed.
- `nix build` was started and advanced into the active musl derivation build stage, but no final exit status was observed in-session.

## Outstanding Risks

- `nix build` was launched on the updated tree and reached the active derivation build stage for `/nix/store/gqf60grlqp3a1831in9b7drlxx8205ir-ralph-burning-static-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl-0.1.0.drv`, but no final success/failure exit was observed in-session, so the authoritative Nix gate remains unresolved.
- Pre-existing live orchestration-state edits under `.ralph-burning/projects/9ni854-1/` were left untouched and remain out of scope.
